founders.name: Kabita Sharma
founders.bio: Passionate about preserving traditional Indian textiles while adding modern touches. Started Kabita Fashion with a vision to make authentic sarees accessible to everyone.
founders.funFact: Can identify any saree fabric just by touching it!

founders.name: Rajesh Patel
founders.bio: Manages all operations and ensures smooth delivery of our products. Believes in sustainable fashion practices.
founders.funFact: Traveled across India to source authentic fabrics

designTeam.name: Priya Reddy
designTeam.bio: NIFT graduate with expertise in blending traditional patterns with contemporary designs. Creates our signature collections.
designTeam.funFact: Has designed over 500 unique saree patterns

designTeam.name: Ananya Singh
designTeam.bio: Specializes in traditional Indian textile techniques. Works directly with weavers to create exclusive fabrics.

operationsTeam.name: Suresh Kumar
operationsTeam.bio: Ensures timely delivery and quality control. Manages our network of artisans and weavers.

operationsTeam.name: Meera Iyer
operationsTeam.bio: Leads our customer support team and ensures every customer has a perfect shopping experience.
operationsTeam.funFact: Knows all regular customers by name

marketingTeam.name: Aarav Sharma
marketingTeam.bio: Develops creative marketing strategies and manages our social media presence.

marketingTeam.name: Neha Gupta
marketingTeam.bio: Creates engaging content about saree styles, care tips, and fashion trends for our blog.
marketingTeam.funFact: Can style a saree in under 5 minutes

companyInfo.mission: To preserve traditional Indian textile arts while making them accessible to modern women worldwide.
companyInfo.vision: To become the most trusted name in authentic Indian sarees globally.
